texto: The Ruhar hit us on Columbus Day. There we were, innocently drifting along the cosmos on our little blue marble, like the native Americans in 1492. Over the horizon come ships of a technologically advanced, aggressive culture, and BAM! There go the good old days, when humans only got killed by each other.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Craig Alanson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “The Ruhar hit us on Columbus Day. There we were, innocently drifting along the cosmos on our litt…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, humorous-quotes, there pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
